name: auto-fetch fee data when Student Admission is selected
script: // frappe.ui.form.on('Custom Program Enrollment', { // student\_admission: function(frm) { // if (!frm.doc.student\_admission) { // return; // } // frappe.db.get\_doc('Create Admission', frm.doc.student\_admission).then(doc => { // if (doc.application\_status !== 'Approved') { // frappe.msgprint({ // title: 'Not Allowed', // message: `This admission application is currently **${doc.application\_status}**. Only **Approved** applications can be enrolled.`, // indicator: 'red' // }); // frm.set\_value('student\_admission', ''); // return; // } // frm.set\_value('student\_name', doc.first\_name + ' ' + (doc.last\_name || '')); // frm.set\_value('program', doc.program); // frm.set\_value('academic\_year', doc.academic\_year); // frm.set\_value('academic\_term', doc.academic\_term); // frm.set\_value('student\_category', doc.student\_category); // frm.clear\_table('fees'); // (doc.fees || []).forEach(row => { // let new\_row = frm.add\_child('fees'); // new\_row.academic\_term = row.academic\_term; // new\_row.fee\_structure = row.fee\_structure; // new\_row.student\_category = row.student\_category; // new\_row.due\_date = row.due\_date; // new\_row.total\_amount = row.total\_amount; // }); // frm.refresh\_field('fees'); // frappe.show\_alert({message: 'Fee details fetched from Admission', indicator: 'green'}); // }); // } // }); frappe.ui.form.on('Custom Program Enrollment', { student\_admission: function(frm) { if (!frm.doc.student\_admission) { return; } frappe.db.get\_doc('Create Admission', frm.doc.student\_admission).then(doc => { if (doc.application\_status !== 'Approved') { frappe.msgprint({ title: 'Not Allowed', message: `This admission application is currently **${doc.application\_status}**. Only **Approved** applications can be enrolled.`, indicator: 'red' }); frm.set\_value('student\_admission', ''); return; } frm.set\_value('student\_name', doc.first\_name + ' ' + (doc.last\_name || '')); frm.set\_value('program', doc.program); frm.set\_value('academic\_year', doc.academic\_year); frm.set\_value('academic\_term', doc.academic\_term); frm.set\_value('student\_category', doc.student\_category); frm.clear\_table('fees'); (doc.fees || []).forEach(row => { let new\_row = frm.add\_child('fees'); new\_row.academic\_term = row.academic\_term; new\_row.fee\_structure = row.fee\_structure; new\_row.student\_category = row.student\_category; new\_row.due\_date = row.due\_date; new\_row.total\_amount = row.total\_amount; }); frm.refresh\_field('fees'); frappe.db.get\_doc('Program', doc.program).then(program\_doc => { frm.clear\_table('courses'); (program\_doc.courses || []).forEach(row => { let new\_row = frm.add\_child('courses'); new\_row.course = row.course; new\_row.course\_name = row.course\_name; }); frm.refresh\_field('courses'); }); frappe.show\_alert({message: 'Fee and course details fetched from Admission', indicator: 'green'}); }); } });
